channel.title: SlipStack Blog
channel.description: Receipt automation, VAT and expense tips for South African small businesses.

item.title: WhatsApp Receipt Automation: How SA Small Businesses Ditch the Shoebox
item.description: Snap a till slip on WhatsApp and it files itself — vendor, date, total and VAT, straight to your own Google Drive, dashboard and accounting. Here's how WhatsApp receipt automation works for a South African small business.
